channel.title: Sprint 12: Release the beta version of the AMP package
channel.description:
# Sprint 12 Planning
You can check the [Sprint board](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/14) for more detail. This sprint will go from February 24th to March 17th. This is going to be our focus:
## Finish the WIP issues: * [Infinite Scroll hooks](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/652): David wrote down the [Final Implementation](https://community.frontity.org/t/infinite-scroll-hooks/2055/32) and it’s just pending a final review. * [AMP initial processors](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/718): The basics processors are created and he is working on the more complex ones that will need e2e tests. * [Selenium tests](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/638): As explained [here](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/638#issuecomment-784308537), most of the work is already done. We have to clean the whole branch and ensure everything works as expected. * [BrowserStack Cypress tests](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/629): This still needs a deeper look. * [Migrate Frontity Connect to RES](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/415): We are still analyzing the best approach for this.
## High priority bugs * [@frontity/google-analytics package doesn't work with Google Analytics 4](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/719) * [REST API - Head Tags doesn't work with AIOSEOP ^4.0.0](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/issues/46)
## AMP beta version * We will release an initial version to test it once the processors are ready. We will work hand-to-hand with Frontity users to see if more processors are needed. * In parallel, we will need to start working on making Frontity packages AMP-aware: * [@frontity/google-tag-manager](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/710) * [@frontity/google-analytics](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/711) * [@frontity/comscore-analytics](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/712) * [@frontity/smart-ads](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/713) * [@frontity/google-ad-manager](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/714) * Once this is ready, it should be safe to use AMP and Frontity.
## Research upcoming features * Technical research [SSR fallback for old browsers](https://community.frontity.org/t/server-side-rendering-fallback-for-old-browsers/4112). * Initial research of the Consent Management Platform functionalities.

item.title: Sprint 12: Release the beta version of the AMP package
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Sprint 12 Review

You can check the Sprint board for more details, but here you have a summary of what we have accomplished. Bear in mind that this sprint was shorter and it was 3 weeks long.

  • The Infinite Scroll hooks were released.
  • A beta of the @frontity/amp package has been released and we have started working on making other Frontity packages AMP-aware. We can start running the first tests to validate the package.
  • We added support for Google Analytics 4.
  • We solved the problem we were having with WebPack builds.
  • We solve the bug Frontity stops working when visiting a link without a trailing slash.
  • The REST API - Head Tags plugin is working now with All In One ^4.0.0.
  • We finished the Pull Request to run our Cypress tests in BrowserStack to test them in different browsers and OS.
  • We already have Implementation Proposal draft for the Server Side Rendering fallback for old browsers.
  • The Selenium BrowserStack tests are almost finished and will help us test Frontity in older browsers.

Read full topic
item.source: Sprint 12: Release the beta version of the AMP package

item.title: Sprint 12: Release the beta version of the AMP package
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Sprint 12 Planning

You can check the Sprint board for more detail. This sprint will go from February 24th to March 17th. This is going to be our focus:

Finish the WIP issues:

  • Infinite Scroll hooks: David wrote down the Final Implementation and it’s just pending a final review.
  • AMP initial processors: The basics processors are created and he is working on the more complex ones that will need e2e tests.
  • Selenium tests: As explained here, most of the work is already done. We have to clean the whole branch and ensure everything works as expected.
  • BrowserStack Cypress tests: This still needs a deeper look.
  • Migrate Frontity Connect to RES: We are still analyzing the best approach for this.

High priority bugs

  • @frontity/google-analytics package doesn’t work with Google Analytics 4
  • REST API - Head Tags doesn’t work with AIOSEOP ^4.0.0

AMP beta version

  • We will release an initial version to test it once the processors are ready. We will work hand-to-hand with Frontity users to see if more processors are needed.
  • In parallel, we will need to start working on making Frontity packages AMP-aware:
    • @frontity/google-tag-manager
    • @frontity/google-analytics
    • @frontity/comscore-analytics
    • @frontity/smart-ads
    • @frontity/google-ad-manager
  • Once this is ready, it should be safe to use AMP and Frontity.

Research upcoming features

  • Technical research SSR fallback for old browsers.
  • Initial research of the Consent Management Platform functionalities.

Read full topic
item.source: Sprint 12: Release the beta version of the AMP package
